---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero-intro}
::: {.hero-intro-text}
<span class="hero-kicker">UNSW School of Population Health</span>

# NSW Child E Cohort Program

<p class="hero-subtitle">Linked population data, tracing NSW children's early life</p>

Understanding the early life origins of child health and development in New South Wales, through linked, population-level data — informing policy and practice for better outcomes.
:::

::: {.hero-intro-graphic}
![](assets/images/logo-mark.svg){fig-alt="NSW Child E Cohort mark: six children of ascending height, holding hands, in a light-to-navy blue gradient, representing the Program's focus on children's journey through early life together"}
:::
:::

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### [Mission](mission.qmd)
Learn about the aims and background of the Program.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### [People](people.qmd)
Meet the investigators, staff, and students leading and supporting this work.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### [Projects](projects.qmd)
Explore the research projects underway within the NSW Child E Cohort Program.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### [Publications](publications.qmd)
Browse papers and reports produced by the Program.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### [Media](media.qmd)
Read news coverage and media mentions of our work.
:::

:::
